options.name: -args
options.description: Get additional arguments to use with the LSF/SGE submit command (bsub/qsub). Example: -x -P PROJ1 -W 10.

options.name: -custom_script
options.description: Get the custom job submission script for distributed processing if the mode is set to "custom".

options.name: -custom_script_local
options.description: Get the custom job submission script for distributed processing if the mode is set to "local".

options.name: -env_script
options.description: Get the value of the environment script for slave start up

options.name: -hosts
options.description: Get the list of hosts for distributed processing via rsh/ssh. A host can be named multiple times

options.name: -local_as_remote
options.description: Get if use local host as remote

options.name: -queue
options.description: Get the name of the job submission queue for LSF or SGE (Sun Grid Engine) queuing systems.

options.name: -reportLsfInfo
options.description: Restore the lsf resource to file

options.name: -resource
options.description: Get the resource string for LSF or SGE queuing systems

options.name: -shellTimeout
options.description: Get the value of the rsh/ssh machine timeout in seconds (the time by which a remote machine responds to a rsh/ssh request)

options.name: -single_cpu_lsf_args
options.description: Get additional arguments to use with the LSF submit command (bsub) for single cpu distributed application only. Example: -x -P PROJ1 -W 10.

options.name: -timeOut
options.description: Get the value of the timeout in seconds (the time by which a remote job must come up and respond to the master)

options.name: -waitForLsfInfo
options.description: Timeout period for waiting for task exit and generate the lsf information
